\noindent Finally, we present results from the \ttblue{pps} evaluation method. For this purpose, we use audit values stored in the variable \ttblue{av2}. The total error amount reflected in \ttblue{av2} is 450,000.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%

\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
from IPython.display import display
myResults["av2"] = accounts_receivable.set_index("invoice").loc[myResults["item"], "av2"].to_numpy()
display(ar.evaluate(av=myResults["av2"], evalMeth="pps"))
display(ar.eval_results["Error estimate"])
\end{Verbatim}
